testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input: I was unable to book the meeting with Jim due to missing information about his availability. To proceed, I recommend obtaining Jim's schedule for the specified days.
testCases.actualOutput: I found available time slots in your schedule, but I couldn't proceed with booking the meeting because I do not have Jim's contact information. Please provide Jim's email or another way to reach him, so I can finalize the arrangement.

testCases.name: test_case_1
testCases.input: I emailed John (john@john.com) three proposed time slots for a meeting this week. The email includes the following options: Wednesday, March 25th, Thursday, March 26th, and Friday, March 27th, all from 9:30 AM to 11:30 AM. John has been asked to confirm which time works best for him.
testCases.actualOutput: I have emailed John to check his availability for the proposed time slots Once John responds, I can help finalize the meeting.
